zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudes de Porhoët III於1148年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰時，他的父親Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan26歲，母親Jeanne Aliénor de Léon-1歲。他和Marguerite de Fougères至少有3個女兒。他去世於1231年1月7日在法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eudes de Porhoët III于1148年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰时，他的父亲Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan26岁，母亲Jeanne Aliénor de Léon-1岁。他和Marguerite de Fougères至少有3个女儿。他去世于1231年1月7日在法国布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): southern and central Yiddish dialectvariant of   Hodes  .

variants.name: Hodes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Myer.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish female personal name Hodes (from Hebrew Hadasa ‘myrtle’).
Polish: from a variant of Chodysz or Chadys, pet forms of the East Slavic personal name Chodor. Compare Hodor .

en.lifeSummary: When Eudes de Porhoët III was born in 1148, in Rohan, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan, was 26 and his mother, Jeanne Aliénor de Léon, was -1. He had at least 3 daughters with Marguerite de Fougères. He died on 7 January 1231, in Josselin, Morbihan, Brittany, France, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudes de Porhoët III est né en 1148, à Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jeanne Aliénor de Léon, avait -1 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Marguerite de Fougères. Il est décédé le 7 janvier 1231, à Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eudes de Porhoët III 1148 in Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan 26 und seine Mutter Jeanne Aliénor de Léon -1. Er hatte mit Marguerite de Fougères mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Januar 1231 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes de Porhoët III è nato il nel 1148 nel Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne Aliénor de Léon, aveva -1 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Marguerite de Fougères. Morì il 7 gennaio 1231, nel Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eudes de Porhoët IIIが1148年にフランスブレタグンモービハンロハンで生まれた時，父Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohanは26歳，母Jeanne Aliénor de Léonは-1歳であった。彼はMarguerite de Fougèresとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1231年1月7日にフランスブレタグンモービハンジョセリンで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eudes de Porhoët III(이)가 1148년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 로핸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne Aliénor de Léon(은)는 -1세였다. 그는 Marguerite de Fougères(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1231년 1월 7일 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 조셀인에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes de Porhoët III nasceu em 1148, em Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne Aliénor de Léon, tinha -1 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Marguerite de Fougères. Ele faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1231, em Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudes de Porhoët III родился в 1148 г. в местности рохань, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne Aliénor de Léon, -1. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Marguerite de Fougères. Он умер 7 января 1231 г. в местности джосселинь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eudes de Porhoët III nació en 1148, en Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jeanne Aliénor de Léon, tenía -1 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Marguerite de Fougères. Murió el 7 de enero de 1231, en Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 83 años.
